stemHtml: You are pilot monitoring on a CAT IIIB approach in LVO descending below alert height, when suddenly you get an ILS signal failure. Choose the correct action.

options.a: Provided that visual references have been established, the approach may be continued manually.
options.b: Do not interrupt the pilot flying and confront the pilot when you have landed.
options.c: Call for a go around and continue with your monitoring duties.
